name: Amazon Q Developer API
what_it_does: AWS-native AI coding assistant and developer platform with API for code generation, security scanning, and codebase understanding — integrated with AWS services, IDEs, and CLI, with enterprise features including customization on private codebases and AWS IAM Identity Center authentication.
use_cases: Code generation and completion in AWS IDEs (Cloud9, VS Code, JetBrains) with AWS context
Automated security vulnerability scanning (OWASP, CWE) via CodeScan API
Codebase transformation for Java/Python upgrades via Transformation API
AWS architecture guidance and service recommendations in natural language
Customizing Q's responses on private enterprise codebases via Q Builder
not_for: Non-AWS infrastructure teams (Q is deeply AWS-integrated — use GitHub Copilot for vendor-neutral)
Individual developers without AWS account (requires AWS account + Identity Center for enterprise)
Teams needing self-hosted AI code assistance
best_when: An AWS-heavy team needs AI coding assistance with AWS service knowledge, security scanning, and enterprise IAM integration in a single platform.
avoid_when: You use multi-cloud or non-AWS infrastructure, or need vendor-neutral AI assistance.

auth.notes: AWS IAM Identity Center (SSO) for enterprise. AWS IAM credentials via STS for programmatic access. Individual users with AWS Builder ID (free tier). OAuth2 PKCE for IDE integration. Standard AWS SigV4 signing for API calls.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: individual developers — code completion, chat, security scans (limited)
pricing.paid_tiers: Q Developer Pro: $19/user/month; Enterprise features via AWS Organizations
pricing.notes: Free tier with AWS Builder ID — no credit card needed. Pro tier adds enterprise customization, admin controls, and higher scan limits. Part of AWS ecosystem — billing via AWS account. Strong security scanning differentiation vs. Copilot. Java upgrade transformation is unique feature.

performance.rate_limits: API calls rate-limited per plan; free tier has lower limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: AWS SDK integration for programmatic code scanning. CodeTransformation API for automated upgrades. Chat API for natural language queries. AWS-standard error codes and retry patterns. Documentation thorough but complex due to AWS ecosystem breadth.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Security scans create new scan jobs — idempotent if same input hash. Code completions stateless — idempotent reads. Transformation jobs create new job per invocation.
known_agent_gotchas: AWS IAM credential setup required — significant friction vs. simple API key auth
Enterprise features require AWS Organizations and Identity Center setup
Code scan API is async — must poll scan job status
Customization (Q Builder) requires 100K-500K lines of code minimum for meaningful fine-tuning

security_score_components.security_notes: AWS-native security — TLS enforced, SigV4 signing, IAM policies. SOC2, GDPR, FedRAMP, HIPAA compliant. Code does not leave AWS region by default. Data residency in US/EU. Enterprise data isolation via AWS Organizations. Security scanning built-in — finds vulnerabilities in generated code.
